resolved_blockers.description: Full repository cleanup is blocked by a broad dirty worktree with many modified and untracked files that may belong to the user.

attempted_resolution.action: Inspected scoped git status and avoided destructive cleanup commands.

resolved_blockers.impact: Repository can be organized safely only after generated artifacts and user-owned changes are separated.
resolved_blockers.resolution: Generated artifact directories were path-scoped and removed; .gitignore now excludes those artifacts from future commits.
